question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/domain/transaction/Transaction.java -> Scope: Medium: Incorrect or missing records exported to mirror nodes'] [Function: Transaction (transactionBytes field)] Can an unprivileged user submit a transaction with an extremely large transactionBytes byte[], causing the mirror node database insert to fail due to column size limits, resulting in the transaction record being missing from the mirror node export?
